markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content creation process improvements and review analytics dashboard for BaseTen's website performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is implementing stricter fact-checking and expert review processes to improve content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [BaseTen emphasizes the need for up-to-date, high-quality content given the fast-paced AI industry](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide a matrix of content types they can confidently produce and explore off-site publishing options](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [New Looker dashboard provides insights on website traffic, engagement, and LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Process Improvements

  - [GrowthX acknowledged previous inaccuracies in outlines and implemented new measures:](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
      - [Constrained information sources to BaseTen documentation and recent, verified data](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
      - [Added expert review step (CTO Daniel) before client delivery](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [Exploring additional human-in-loop fact-checking processes](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [BaseTen raised concerns about:](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [LLM training data being outdated (last updated June 2024)](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [Need for discernment in information quality and market-level insights](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Detailed approval process and inputs for future outlines](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Matrix of content types they can confidently produce](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
      - [Exploration of off-site publishing options to build BaseTen's authority](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

### Analytics Dashboard Review

  - [New Looker dashboard integrates Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4 data](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Key metrics include:](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
      - [Overall sessions vs. engaged sessions (engagement rate target: \>50% for long-form content)](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
      - [Landing page performance by traffic source](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
      - [Query ranking distribution (branded vs. non-branded)](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
      - [Conversion events (specific definitions to be clarified with GA4 setup team)](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
      - [LLM referral traffic and top-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [BaseTen team interested in incorporating PostHog data and understanding search queries leading to LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [BaseTen emphasized the need for very recent information (3-6 months max) due to rapid industry changes](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Discussion on publishing content outside BaseTen's domain to increase authority and influence LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [GrowthX exploring experimental options for seeding content in authoritative sources](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send updated outline with improved fact-checking and expert review](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Provide detailed content creation process and matrix of confidently producible content types](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Explore and recommend off-site publishing options for building BaseTen's authority](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Investigate possibility of incorporating PostHog data into the analytics dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Update Scrunch dashboard with new prompts for more relevant AI visibility insights](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [Clarify conversion event definitions in Google Analytics 4 with setup team](https://fathom.video/share/Rzwe6pA8V6YYH12HBsohXxDGqcN_ueaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
